channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 57/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 57/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 18.5%.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: UK and Japan poised to seal landmark £18 billion investment deal to create thousands of jobs
item.description: UK and Japan poised to seal landmark £18 billion investment deal to create thousands of jobs

item.title: The Mirror: On the campaign trail with Andy Burnham - as he vows to give towns a voice - The Mirror
item.description: On the campaign trail with Andy Burnham - as he vows to give towns a voice - The Mirror

item.title: The Telegraph: Burnham failed me, claims woman ‘raped by police’ - The Telegraph
item.description: Burnham failed me, claims woman ‘raped by police’ - The Telegraph

item.title: Reuters: UK's Starmer, Trump discuss efforts to end Iran conflict - Reuters
item.description: UK's Starmer, Trump discuss efforts to end Iran conflict - Reuters

item.title: Sky News Politics: Badenoch calls on Labour rivals to cut welfare spending and boost defence
item.description: Badenoch calls on Labour rivals to cut welfare spending and boost defence

item.title:
Bluesky · @iandunt.bsky.social: This is some interesting insight into the debates that led to John Healey's departure as Defence Secretary
Interestingly, Burnham has hinted at backing something similar in previous comments ... 1/n www.bbc.co.uk/new...
item.description:
This is some interesting insight into the debates that led to John Healey's departure as Defence Secretary
Interestingly, Burnham has hinted at backing something similar in previous comments ... 1/n www.bbc.co.uk/new...

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Burnham warns UK is heading for ‘poisonous’ politics of US under Starmer leadership
item.description: Burnham warns UK is heading for ‘poisonous’ politics of US under Starmer leadership

item.title: Reuters: Starmer tells Rutte UK will publish defence plan before NATO July summit - Reuters
item.description: Starmer tells Rutte UK will publish defence plan before NATO July summit - Reuters

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): The case for Labour to introduce a wealth tax has never been stronger | Phillip Inman
item.description: The case for Labour to introduce a wealth tax has never been stronger | Phillip Inman

item.title:
Bluesky · @georgeeaton.bsky.social: Getting more people into work is a long-term project – it won’t suddenly fund higher defence spending (as Burnham suggests).
Real choices are: raise taxes on most people/raise borrowing/cut spending.
item.description:
Getting more people into work is a long-term project – it won’t suddenly fund higher defence spending (as Burnham suggests).
Real choices are: raise taxes on most people/raise borrowing/cut spending.
